faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions we receive

items.a: A certified translation is produced by a licensed translator and carries the translator's official stamp, signature, and certification statement. It is legally accepted by Saudi ministries, courts, embassies, and foreign authorities as an accurate rendering of the source document.

items.q: Are your translations accepted by embassies and government bodies?
items.a: Yes. Tabador Translation Est. holds Translation Licence No. 317 and is accepted by all Saudi government authorities (Jawazat, MOHE, MOFA, MOH, MOJ, Chambers of Commerce) and by foreign embassies inside and outside the Kingdom — including full Schengen file acceptance.
Standard turnaround for most personal documents is same-day or next business day. We also offer an express service for time-sensitive filings. Timing is confirmed with your quote.
More than 100 language pairs, including Arabic ⇄ English, French, German, Spanish, Italian, Urdu, Turkish, Farsi, Tagalog, Chinese, Russian, and more. If you need a specific pair, ask us.
Absolutely. Send a clear scan or photo via WhatsApp, email, or the quick-quote form on this page. You do not need to visit the office unless you prefer to.
Pricing is based on the document type, length, language pair, and urgency. We send you a fixed quote before any work starts — no surprises.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from individuals, law firms, and embassies we serve

faqPage.title: Help Center
faqPage.subtitle: Everything you need to know about certified translation in Saudi Arabia

items.a: A certified translation is produced by a licensed translator who attaches an official stamp, signature, and a statement of accuracy. This is what makes it legally accepted by ministries, courts, embassies, and immigration authorities.

items.q: Why can't I use Google Translate or AI?
items.a: Machine translations have no legal standing — no Saudi authority or foreign embassy will accept them. Certified translation requires a licensed human translator who is legally accountable for the accuracy of the document.

items.q: Do you certify the content of the document?
items.a: No. We certify the fidelity of the translation only — that the translation accurately reflects the source. The truthfulness or validity of the original document is the responsibility of its issuer.
Pricing depends on document type, length, language pair, and how urgent you need it. We send a fixed quote within minutes — no hidden fees, no surprises after delivery.

items.q: Do you charge for the certification stamp?
items.a: No. The certification stamp, signature, and one printed copy are included in the price. Extra physical copies are available at a small additional cost.

For most personal documents (IDs, certificates, passports), same-day delivery is possible if you submit before noon. For larger files or rare languages, we'll confirm a precise turnaround in your quote.

items.q: Can I submit by phone or do I need to visit?
items.a: You don't need to visit. Send a clear scan or photo via WhatsApp, email, or the quote form on this site. Pickup or delivery options are arranged after the translation is complete.

items.q: What file formats do you accept?
items.a: PDF, JPG, PNG, WEBP, DOC, and DOCX. The quote-form upload accepts files up to 3 MB; for larger files (rare for certified docs), send via WhatsApp.
Yes. All documents are handled with strict confidentiality. We do not share your documents with third parties and they are deleted from our systems after delivery upon request.

items.q: What if my translation is rejected by an authority?
items.a: Our first-time-acceptance guarantee covers exactly this. If a Saudi authority or embassy rejects a translation we issued, we correct it free of charge until it is accepted.

items.q: Do you handle Schengen visa applications?
items.a: Yes — Schengen files are one of our most common services. We translate every required document with the proper certification expected by the consulates of France, Germany, Italy, Spain, the Netherlands, and other Schengen states.

items.q: Can you deliver to a different city or abroad?
items.a: Yes. Local pickup is from our office opposite Jawazat in Dammam. We also offer email delivery (certified PDF) and courier delivery anywhere in the Kingdom or abroad at the client's preferred carrier.

faqPage.stillBody: We answer WhatsApp and phone calls during working hours — Sunday through Thursday, 8 AM to 10 PM.

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Fixed price, agreed before any work starts
pricing.intro: We don't publish a fixed rate card because every document is different. What we do promise: a precise, fixed quote within minutes of seeing your document — with no hidden fees.

howItems.title: Document type
howItems.desc: Personal docs (IDs, certificates) are priced per-document; long reports are priced per-word.

howItems.title: Language pair
howItems.desc: English ⇄ Arabic is the most common; rarer pairs (Farsi, Chinese, Tagalog) are slightly higher.

howItems.title: Turnaround
howItems.desc: Standard (next business day) vs. express (same-day) — you choose.

howItems.title: Volume
howItems.desc: Batch discounts for multiple documents, embassy files, and corporate clients.

guaranteeItems: Fixed quote before we start — never pay more than the number we sent you.
No hidden fees for certification stamp, signature, or second copy.
Re-translation or minor corrections within scope are free.
Quotes are free and carry no obligation.

about.title: About Tabador
about.subtitle: 15+ Years of Certified Excellence in Dammam
about.body: Tabador Translation Est. has been the trusted choice for certified translations in Dammam and the Eastern Province for over 15 years. Founded by Mudthar Ahmad, a professional translator, we built our reputation on a simple promise: your documents right the first time.
about.missionBody: Deliver certified translations that are accepted on the first submission — saving our clients time, cost, and stress.
about.visionBody: To be the Eastern Province's most trusted translation partner for individuals, businesses, and government.
